genesLocalizedToErVacuoleTransportVesicl.row_predicate: ((("Localization" = 'ER' OR ("Localization" = 'vacuole' OR "Localization" = 'transport vesicles')) OR ("Localization" = 'plasma membrane' OR ("Localization" = 'golgi' OR ("Localization" IS NULL OR "Localization" NOT IN ('nucleus', 'cytoplasm', 'mitochondria', 'cytoskeleton', 'ER', 'plasma membrane', 'golgi', 'vacuole', 'transport vesicles'))))) OR (rowid IN (13,28,36,61,164,185,192,243,248,254,259,262,276,277,290,309,310,320,323,357,368,418,436,455,467,471,477,497,500,504,528,547,552,557,561,568,577,580,587,594,598,605,634,652,703,714,733,762,817,821,854)))

vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

predicate_sqls: ((("Localization" = 'ER' OR ("Localization" = 'vacuole' OR "Localization" = 'transport vesicles')) OR ("Localization" = 'plasma membrane' OR ("Localization" = 'golgi' OR ("Localization" IS NULL OR "Localization" NOT IN ('nucleus', 'cytoplasm', 'mitochondria', 'cytoskeleton', 'ER', 'plasma membrane', 'golgi', 'vacuole', 'transport vesicles'))))) OR (rowid IN (13,28,36,61,164,185,192,243,248,254,259,262,276,277,290,309,310,320,323,357,368,418,436,455,467,471,477,497,500,504,528,547,552,557,561,568,577,580,587,594,598,605,634,652,703,714,733,762,817,821,854)))
base_predicate_sqls: (("Localization" = 'ER' OR ("Localization" = 'vacuole' OR "Localization" = 'transport vesicles')) OR ("Localization" = 'plasma membrane' OR ("Localization" = 'golgi' OR ("Localization" IS NULL OR "Localization" NOT IN ('nucleus', 'cytoplasm', 'mitochondria', 'cytoskeleton', 'ER', 'plasma membrane', 'golgi', 'vacuole', 'transport vesicles')))))
fragment_roles: rows where Localization = mitochondria + rows where Localization = cytoskeleton

rows where Localization = ER + rows where Localization = vacuole + rows where Localization = transport vesicles + rows where Localization = plasma membrane + rows where Localization = golgi + rows where Localization is NULL or not in {'nucleus', 'cytoplasm', 'mitochondria', 'cytoskeleton', 'ER', 'plasma membrane', 'golgi', 'vacuole', 'transport vesicles'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
rows where Type = Genetic + rows where Type = Genetic-Physical or is NULL
Interactions.fragment_role_B: rows where Type = Genetic + rows where Type = Genetic-Physical or is NULL

justification.cross_local_query_count_interpretation: Distinct cross-local workload queries where this fragment pair (different original tables) co-occurs; not an estimate of single-local queries after relocation.
Distinct cross-local workload queries where this fragment pair (different original tables) co-occurs; not an estimate of single-local queries after relocation.

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
